expectedResponse.note: Per conventions Auth model: on successful verify issue JWT access + refresh tokens (Authorization: Bearer <access>). Access token carries sub (userId), businessId (tenant), role (owner|staff). Session/user object returned alongside tokens; refresh rotation at POST /auth/refresh. As-built the screen only calls session.logIn() (SessionStore mock over shared_preferences, no field names) — the token exchange slots in here. phone comes from GoRouterState.extra; code is the 6-digit _controller text (digitsOnly, length==6 gates the Verify button).

Re-issues the code for the same phone. Same as-built path as login's request-OTP action (POST /auth/request-otp) — always 202, no account enumeration, rate-limited per phone and per IP, 10-min expiry, max 5 attempts (conventions Auth model). As-built the Resend link only resets a 24s local countdown and shows a snackbar 'Code resent to <phone>'; no backend call yet.

authContext.note: This screen COMPLETES authentication (unauthenticated when called; a successful verify-OTP is what mints the JWT). role (owner|staff) arrives in the issued token, it is not sent by this screen. signup flag branches navigation only: signup==true pushes /setup (business setup, no session.logIn), signup==false calls session.logIn() and goes to /dashboard.

uiStatesHandled: code-entry: six digit boxes over an invisible TextField; digitsOnly, max length 6; Verify button disabled until exactly 6 digits entered
resend-countdown: 'Resend in 0:SS' shown while a per-send timer counts down (as-built seeds 24s)
resend-available: after countdown reaches 0, tappable 'Resend code' link (fires resend-OTP; resets countdown + snackbar confirmation)
edit-phone: 'Edit' / back affordance to return to the phone-entry (login) screen
invalid-code: NOT surfaced as-built (mock accepts any 6 digits) — backend verify-OTP must drive a wrong-code error state the UI shows
code-expired: NOT surfaced as-built — backend 10-minute expiry must drive an expired state prompting resend
attempts-remaining / locked-out: NOT surfaced as-built — backend max-5-attempts and per-phone/per-IP rate-limit (RATE_LIMITED 429) must drive attempts-remaining / temporarily-locked states
notes: Screen: lib/screens/onboarding/otp_screen.dart; data seam: lib/data/session.dart (SessionStore.logIn mock). The fallback phone literal '08032218890' (line ~76, used only when GoRouterState.extra is null) is a display placeholder, NOT backend data. No repository/drift reads on this screen. Money/entity supersedes (S-1..S-4) do not affect this auth screen.
